name: Paul Ryan
subject: THIS IS IT
body:
Fellow Conservative,

Conservatives have a decision to make.

America is at a crossroads, and the path we choose this year **will** determine the direction of this country for decades to come.

I've placed my faith in the idea of a confident America, a bold conservative policy agenda that advances the American Dream and strengthens the American people.

Now it's time for you **to prove that you also believe in a confident America** , by standing up for our Republican Senate and House majority and our bold~~ ~~ conservative reforms with a [donation of just $30 or more.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35105906:W6xZgjYXN:m:1:1320601823:2490569391825B555CC7320CA80EE241:r)

**Can I depend on your support?**

Our FEC-mandated filing deadline is at **midnight** tonight. There is not much time left to reach this very important goal.

**Can I count on you to stand up for conservative reforms and make a difference for Republicans before our deadline tonight?**
[**TAKE ACTION NOW: Every dollar matters.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35105907:W6xZgjYXN:m:1:1320601823:2490569391825B555CC7320CA80EE241:r)
_Your contribution provides invaluable resources for our Republican Senate campaigns. A Conservative Republican Senate victory will not be possible in November without your help._

**[Chip in $60 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35105908:W6xZgjYXN:m:1:1320601823:2490569391825B555CC7320CA80EE241:r)**
****
[**Chip in $90 immediately >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35105909:W6xZgjYXN:m:1:1320601823:2490569391825B555CC7320CA80EE241:r)****

**[Chip in $120 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35105910:W6xZgjYXN:m:1:1320601823:2490569391825B555CC7320CA80EE241:r)**
****
**[Chip in $250 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35105911:W6xZgjYXN:m:1:1320601823:2490569391825B555CC7320CA80EE241:r)**

Or contribute another amount by following this secure link:

[https://contribute.nrsc.org/contribute](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35105912:W6xZgjYXN:m:1:1320601823:2490569391825B555CC7320CA80EE241:r)
**Conservatives like you get it.** You understand the problems our nation faces, and you understand that maintaining a conservative majority in the House and Senate is the only way our nation can move forward and address them.

You've stood by us in the past and now I need you to stand by us once again. I hope I can count on your support before our midnight deadline tonight.

Thank you,

Speaker Paul Ryan

| [Contribute](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35105913:W6xZgjYXN:m:1:1320601823:2490569391825B555CC7320CA80EE241:r)
---

| Paid for by the NRSC.
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
[www.NRSC.org](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35105914:W6xZgjYXN:m:1:1320601823:2490569391825B555CC7320CA80EE241:r)
---

name: PA Senate HQ
subject: Republicans SCARED
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3508649236113653760/6806088026607845376?refcode=e20160430&refcode2=e20160430nd&amount=25)
---
_**Friend, the GOP is already going after Katie!**_
**[Fight back now -- chip in before tonight's monthly deadline >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3508649236113653760/6806088026607845376?refcode=e20160430&refcode2=e20160430nd&amount=25)** Friend -- Since Katie won her primary on Tuesday:

* The Club for Growth put out a disgusting ad that smears her achievements
* The U.S. Chamber of Commerce shelled out hundreds of thousands of dollars trying to sugarcoat Pat Toomey's failed record in Washington
* **And Toomey himself released a vicious ad attacking Katie!**

All these attacks show Republicans are scared, friend. Katie's got what it takes to beat Toomey in November -- so they want to tarnish her reputation with voters right off the bat.

**But we 're not going to let that happen. We're going to fight back by hitting -- AND BEATING -- our $25,000 grassroots fundraising goal.**

[**TONIGHT is the first end-of-month deadline since Katie won her primary, and our chance to really make a statement. Can we count on you to chip in before midnight?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3508649236113653760/6806088026607845376?refcode=e20160430&refcode2=e20160430nd&amount=25)

Thank you,

PA Senate HQ
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3508649236113653760/6806088026607845376?refcode=e20160430&refcode2=e20160430nd&amount=25)
---

name: John Kasich
subject: 🔜 11:59PM
body:
In case you missed the news, I was endorsed by the U.S. Hispanic
Chamber of Commerce last week!

Peter - we have a critical
April deadline at midnight tonight.

16 consecutive polls show I'm the
only Republican who can defeat Hillary Clinton. Can you help us
out with a quick contribution?
The GOP Convention is just 79
days away!
Thank you!
John Kasich
Governor of Ohio & Presidential
Candidate
JohnKasich.com

P.S. In case you missed the news,
I was endorsed by the U.S. Hispanic Chamber of Commerce last
week! Read more at: JohnKasich.com/News

DONATE

for America

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Get your Official Woman Card before midnight tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors
body:
You do not want to miss this | Friend --

At this point, I'm sure you heard that Donald Trump said that the only reason Hillary has any votes is because she’s “playing the woman’s card."

But did you hear his team make it worse? One of his senior advisers implied that women who support Hillary just aren’t using our brains.

Puh-lease.

It's clear this team isn't going to put up with any of that. In the past two days, thousands and thousands of you donated to get your very own Woman Card and show your support for the candidate who’s going to be the strongest fighter for women and girls the White House has ever seen.

**The deadline to get your Woman Card is midnight tonight -- chip in $1 right now to get yours.**
[
](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjUzNzU1NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0Njc0NTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0) [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUzNzU1NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0Njc0NTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUzNzU1NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0Njc0NTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks!

Christina

Christina Reynolds
Deputy Communications Director
Hillary for America

**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjUzNzU1NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0Njc0NTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjUzNzU1NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0Njc0NTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjUzNzU1NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0Njc0NTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjUzNzU1NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0Njc0NTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjUzNzU1NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0Njc0NTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjUzNzU1NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0Njc0NTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjUzNzU1NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0Njc0NTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjUzNzU1NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0Njc0NTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjUzNzU1NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0Njc0NTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjUzNzU1NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0Njc0NTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjUzNzU1NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0Njc0NTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjUzNzU1NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0Njc0NTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Jordyn Rush
subject: nothing short of astounding
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6359426700727549952/5004929650636357632?refcode=e20160430.2&refcode2=e20160430.2nd&amount=25)
---
Friend -- I couldn't believe how quickly Republicans and their deep-pocketed special interest allies started attacking Katie after she won her primary. I've seen a lot, but even I was surprised.

**But the response we 've seen from our grassroots supporters has been nothing short of astounding.**

* You are OUTRAGED that Katie is the target of vicious and unfair attacks.
* You are SICK of Pat Toomey's obstructionism and his record of putting Wall Street over Pennsylvania's families in Washington
* You are READY for the new brand of leadership Katie will bring to the Senate.

**And you 're so fired up that we've _almost_ reached our $25,000 end-of-month goal!** There's just a bit more to raise -- I know we can do it before our midnight deadline!

[**Friend, will you be the one to put us over the top?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6359426700727549952/5004929650636357632?refcode=e20160430.2&refcode2=e20160430.2nd&amount=25)

The general election will be a HUGE fight -- and we can only win with you on board.

Thanks so much,

Jordyn Rush
Deputy Campaign Director

P.S. The _Washington Post_ reports that [Democrats'] "path to the majority goes directly through vulnerable GOP incumbents such as Sen. Pat Toomey." By helping Katie, you're also helping Democrats take back the Senate and bring about the progress America needs. [**Please pitch it before midnight!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6359426700727549952/5004929650636357632?refcode=e20160430.2&refcode2=e20160430.2nd&amount=25)
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6359426700727549952/5004929650636357632?refcode=e20160430.2&refcode2=e20160430.2nd&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6359426700727549952/4932872056598429696).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Tonight's deadline matters
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
When we started this campaign, I wrote that "I run not to oppose any man or woman, but to propose new and far-reaching policies to deal with the crises of our times."
I am very good at arithmetic, and I can count delegates. We are behind today, but you know what? A path forward still exists. And our job right now is not only to transform our country, but the Democratic Party as well.
And you need to know that every vote we win going forward and every delegate we send to the Democratic convention not only moves us closer to the nomination but also moves our party and our country closer to the ideas we're fighting for.
**Today is a very important day for our political revolution** : it's the second to last FEC fundraising deadline before the end of the primary. And every member of the corporate media and political establishment in this country will be looking to see if you're willing to continue this fight together. And that's why I have to ask:
[**If everyone who has signed up to join our political revolution makes a $2.70 contribution before our critical midnight FEC fundraising deadline and we'll have the resources we need to continue our fight all the way through the Democratic primary.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april_deadline?refcode=em160430-s1-sub-c "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april_deadline?refcode=em160430-s1-sub-c")
It's not just about how much money we are able to raise before tonight's deadline, but the total number of individual contributions we receive. When the corporate media and political establishment look at our FEC report, they're going to see every single donation as a continuing demonstration of support for the values we share. That's why it's so important you add yours before midnight.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april_deadline?refcode=em160430-s1-sub-c "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april_deadline?refcode=em160430-s1-sub-c")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Get your official woman card (midnight deadline)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors
body:
These make great gifts! | Friend --

We’re just hours away from our April end-of-month fundraising deadline, which means it’s ALSO your last chance to get an official Woman Card. (Or get one for a friend! I snagged one for my mom, she’s going to love it.)

While Donald Trump’s team says that women who support Hillary aren’t using their brains, this team is coming through in force to say that we’re going to fight all the way to the end to elect the most qualified, committed person in the race.

**Are you in? Chip in $1 to get your official Woman Card before the midnight deadline -- this is your last chance to grab one!**
[
](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjUzNzU5NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0NzAyNTYzS0&mt=1&rt=0) [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUzNzU5NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0NzAyNTYzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks,

Robby

This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjUzNzU5NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0NzAyNTYzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjUzNzU5NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0NzAyNTYzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjUzNzU5NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0NzAyNTYzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjUzNzU5NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0NzAyNTYzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjUzNzU5NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0NzAyNTYzS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjUzNzU5NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0NzAyNTYzS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjUzNzU5NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0NzAyNTYzS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjUzNzU5NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0NzAyNTYzS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.

Are you in? name: Corry Bliss
subject: deadline
body:
| Peter --
Rob asked me to reach out to you.

I know that it is the weekend, but this is urgent. Rob has $3,007 left to raise for the end of the month goal and we may not reach it. He asked if you would be willing to chip in before the deadline tonight. [Can you donate $10, $20, or even $50](https://www.robportman.com/april_goal?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_eom_05&n=1)? If you can donate more, please consider chipping in [$250, $500 or whatever you can afford](https://www.robportman.com/april_goal?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_eom_05&n=2). We must raise $3,007 before midnight to help keep our campaign strong. Any amount helps. I will let Rob know that I reached out to you and tell him if you are able to donate. [Click here to donate now to our campaign](https://www.robportman.com/april_goal?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_eom_05&n=3). Thank you!

Corry \---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Rob Portman** <robportman@robportman.com>
Date: Fri, Apr 29, 2016 at 9:54 AM
Subject: did you get my message?
To: corrybliss@robportman.com

Corry --

Did you get my email on Monday?

Let me update you in case you did not receive it. Earlier this week, Senator Harry Reid's Super PAC announced that they are spending $1,000,000 on misleading TV ads attacking me across Ohio in the next two weeks.

Last week, the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC) announced that they will spend at least $10,000,000 against me this fall. Corry, I must fight back. That’s why I am reaching out for your help today. I have $18,902 left to raise for this month’s online fundraising goal. [Can you help me reach our goal](https://www.robportman.com/april_goal?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_eom_05&n=4) before tomorrow at midnight? [
](https://www.robportman.com/april_goal?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_eom_05&n=5 "Donate Here!")[
](https://www.robportman.com/april_goal?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_eom_05&n=6 "Donate
Here!")[

](https://www.robportman.com/april_goal?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_eom_05&n=7 "Donate Here!")[

](https://www.robportman.com/april_goal?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_eom_05&n=8 "Donate Here!")[
](https://www.robportman.com/april_goal?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_eom_05&n=9 "Donate Here!")[

](https://www.robportman.com/april_goal?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_eom_05&n=10 "Donate Any
Amount!")
Please let me know if you are able to help. I have a strict deadline tomorrow that I must meet! Thank you so much for your generosity, Corry!

You can donate by using this link: [https://www.robportman.com/april_goal

](https://www.robportman.com/april_goal?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_eom_05&n=11 "Donate Here!") All best,

Rob [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_eom_05&n=12)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_eom_05&n=13)[](https://www.robportman.com/april_goal?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_eom_05&n=14 "Donate Here!")

---
-=-=-

name: Joe Biden
subject: I’m asking you, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
Dear Friend --

Born in Scranton, I know a fair bit about what Pennsylvanians value: Honesty. Grit. Hard work. A fair shot for everyone. **That 's what this state and our country are about. That's what Katie McGinty is about. She embodies those values to her core.** It's who she is.

Daughter of a Philadelphia cop and restaurant hostess. Ninth of ten kids -- who went to St. Joe's as the first in her family to go to a four-year college. A top lawyer who takes on big polluters. A business leader who proves Pennsylvania can create good-paying jobs by protecting our environment. A public servant who understands budgets and laws reflect our values -- investing in public education, providing health care for millions of Pennsylvanians, and protecting the rights of women, workers, and voters -- and the right to be who you are and marry the person you love.

**Friend, it 's game time. Katie just won an extremely competitive primary, and now she's preparing for one of the toughest Senate challenges in the entire country.**

[**Katie needs us by her side. Will you donate $5 or whatever you can today so Katie has the grassroots support to take on her incumbent opponent and win? Defeating Pat Toomey is going to take everything we 've got -- Katie and I are counting on you now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/7295212491552849920/1762900868883021824?refcode=e20160430.4&refcode2=e20160430.4nd&amount=25)

I served in the Senate for 36 years. I've seen firsthand how important a Democratic Senate majority is in moving the country forward on everything we care about --affordable health care, good-paying middle-class jobs, a great education for our kids. I can go on.

This year, we have a great opportunity to get our majority back -- to end Republican obstruction on the Supreme Court and denial of equal pay for women and protecting Social Security for our seniors.

We need people like Katie who will grab the baton from me and Barack, and keep the progress going to protect everything we've worked so hard to accomplish over eight years on behalf of the country.

**Friend, that 's exactly why it's so important we help Katie out now, early on. We know the other side is going to fight hard to keep this seat.**

[**We need to make sure she has what she needs to win. Will you donate right now so Katie can turn the Senate back to blue?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/7295212491552849920/1762900868883021824?refcode=e20160430.4&refcode2=e20160430.4nd&amount=25)

Thanks for all you do,

Joe Biden
---
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/7295212491552849920/1762900868883021824?refcode=e20160430.4&refcode2=e20160430.4nd&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---

If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/7295212491552849920/1690843274845093888).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Ok, wow.
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Wow. Ok, we didn't really know what to expect after Bernie's email this morning, but one thing is clear: our political revolution is ready, willing and able to continue our campaign to transform the Democratic Party and to transform our nation.
More than 20,000 people have already contributed to our campaign today, and they're continuing to pour in:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april_deadline?refcode=em160430-s2 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april_deadline?refcode=em160430-s2")
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april_deadline?refcode=em160430-s2 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april_deadline?refcode=em160430-s2")**
But we still have a few hours left to go before our critical FEC fundraising deadline. It's not just about how much money we raise, but how many individuals contribute to say they're Still Sanders.
[**If everyone who has signed up to join our political revolution makes a $2.70 contribution before our critical midnight FEC fundraising deadline we'll have the resources we need to continue our fight all the way through the Democratic primary.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april_deadline?refcode=em160430-s2 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april_deadline?refcode=em160430-s2")
We have a chance to have more individual contributions to our campaign in the month of April than any other candidate in this election, and that would send an unmistakable message about the continued strength of our political revolution before Indiana votes in three days.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Russ Feingold
subject: A tale of two campaigns
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
You're in this. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4262/1c469400/510ed0a/3562499/2542609226/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-april?utm_source=ema_2016-04-30_rf_nd&refcode=ema_2016-04-30_rf_nd&utm_campaign=rf&utm_medium=ema") Friend, This is a tale of two campaigns. There's the campaign that's funded primarily by large-dollar donations with three different super PACs plus the Koch brothers on their side. And then there's our campaign. Our story is different: We're funded primarily by small-dollar donors. That's why we have to work twice as hard to stay on track. I can't write our campaign a check like Senator Johnson can -- and I don't have the Koch brothers and multiple super PACs backing us at every step. **[We're so close to hitting our $50,000 grassroots goal for the month. Will you contribute $5 by midnight tonight to put us over the top?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4262/1c469400/510ed0a/3562499/2542609226/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-april?utm_source=ema_2016-04-30_rf_nd&refcode=ema_2016-04-30_rf_nd&utm_campaign=rf&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4262/1c469400/510ed0a/3562499/2542609226/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-april?utm_source=ema_2016-04-30_rf_nd&refcode=ema_2016-04-30_rf_nd&utm_campaign=rf&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4262/1c469400/510ed0a/3562499/2542609226/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-april?utm_source=ema_2016-04-30_rf_nd&refcode=ema_2016-04-30_rf_nd&utm_campaign=rf&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4262/1c469400/510ed0a/3562496/2542609226/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-april?utm_source=ema_2016-04-30_rf_nd&refcode=ema_2016-04-30_rf_nd&utm_campaign=rf&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjUzNzg0NTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwMDA1MjYwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjUzNzg0NTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwMDA1MjYwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=MjUzNzg0NTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwMDA1MjYwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjUzNzg0NTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwMDA1MjYwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjUzNzg0NTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwMDA1MjYwS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjUzNzg0NTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwMDA1MjYwS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjUzNzg0NTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwMDA1MjYwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=MjUzNzg0NTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwMDA1MjYwS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjUzNzg0NTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwMDA1MjYwS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
